level_signals: 3+ years of product management or engineering experience
Owns roadmap for a core area of Fleet
Shapes product strategy alongside founders and leadership

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 3+ years of product management or engineering experience
Hands-on experience building with LLMs, agents, or AI applications.
Deeply technical — you can hold your own in conversations about API design, system architecture, data pipelines, and debugging production issues.
Bias toward action — you'd rather ship, learn, and iterate than build the perfect solution upfront.
Strong written and verbal communicator who can align cross-functional teams around a shared vision.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Computer Science, Engineering, or equivalent technical background.
Previous experience at a high-growth startup or developer-focused company.

scope.surface: LangSmith Fleet — product for bringing agents to every team in an organization; includes natural language agent management, security, observability, model flexibility, admin controls, and API extensibility
core_responsibilities: Own the roadmap for a core area of the Fleet.
Work with customers to understand their challenges and define new product features.
Work with engineering to define scope, make technical tradeoffs, and ship high-impact features quickly.
Help shape product strategy alongside our founders and leadership team.

green_flags: Clear product surface ownership (Fleet) with defined scope
Company has strong traction: $125M Series B, 6,000+ customers, 5 of Fortune 10 using LangSmith
Well-known investors (IVP, Sequoia, Benchmark, CapitalG, Sapphire)
Explicitly states all team members have meaningful impact
red_flags: No location or remote/hybrid policy stated — work arrangement is entirely unclear
3+ years floor is relatively low for the strategic scope described (owning roadmap, shaping strategy alongside founders); actual seniority bar may be higher
Compensation note mentions 'variable compensation for relevant roles' without clarifying if this role qualifies
